completed_tasks.name: TypeScript types for all 14 API schemas
HTTP client with auth, rate limiter, error handling

human_actions_pending.action: Run `AI_ARK_API_KEY=<key> bun dist/index.js credits` to confirm live API auth works
human_actions_pending.context: Verifier marked as human_needed — can't test without real API key

human_actions_pending.action: Burst-test rate limiter (6 rapid acquire() calls, 6th should wait ~1s)
human_actions_pending.context: Runtime timing verification — logic is correct but untested under load

decisions.decision: Removed startup API key guard from index.ts
decisions.rationale: Blocked --help from working without a key. Per-command error handling is cleaner.
Mature, typed, standard for Node/Bun CLIs

decisions.decision: 3-tier token bucket rate limiter (not sliding window)
decisions.rationale: Simpler, matches API's burst/sustained/hourly limits directly

next_action: /gsd:plan-phase 2 — plan the 6 core sync command implementations
context_notes: Phase 1 complete and verified. All automated checks pass. Phase 2 adds the 6 sync endpoint commands (companies search, people search/lookup/phone/analyze, credits already done). The typed client + rate limiter from Phase 1 means each new command is just a thin wrapper calling client.post() with the right types.
